{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118151384775536978A1EB98270"}"},"total":2114},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7545152947779715865","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！主角很懂得揣度人性，知进退，懂把握分寸也知道抓住机会很有野心的一个人，他也懂得尊重女性，也欣赏那些有野心想往上爬的女性更支持她们，虽然主角对多位女主都是从利用和利益开始，甚至刚开始会想让他们死，但女主开始对他付出真心主角也会同样回以真心，虽然野心比真心多但只要不背叛他，他也会回以你更多的好，总的来说主角的人设很好，女主们的人设也可以最喜欢郡主了，但相比主角来说，女主们的人设剧情描写的太少不是很饱满，剧情到最后也有点不太完美，但总体来说是很好看的小说，正准备再看作者的其他两本小说，希望作者多多创作，感恩🙏🏻哈门"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756748339,"group_id":"7372533765823810584","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwy/Nq3BtrEU+MvTS5Wh2oPM2ApwqexoRae6zTqdyMWX","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/813a274657f2480283bd7a15cd09aad4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622541&x-signature=bTyCvjolY9Fqk%2Fys1whDrA%2Fh4Pg%3D","user_id":"1033966606355319","user_name":"想要钱与权"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1033966606355319","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1755759914,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7372533765823810584","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+架空历史+无系统+男魅魔+超高颜值+赘婿逆袭爽文】 
现代少年徐则安一朝穿越成为大夏朝的一位赘婿，结果还被悔婚，徐则安果断“另寻高就”。
恰好有个通天梯摆在眼前，放完狠话徐则安转头做了四家赘婿。
只是越到后面事情的发展越来越不对劲。
由于颜值太过逆天，无数美人对他倾心不已。
千金小姐扬言非他不嫁，绝美花魁因他封心锁爱，疯批郡主为爱成魔。
敌国女将与他相爱相杀，甚至连别国女帝都要将他纳入后宫！为此不惜发动了一场战争！
徐则安成为了真正的蓝颜祸水。
不是吧！人在古代成魅魔了！？
美娇娘，好岳父，通天梯，一路贵人相助，徐则安软饭硬吃，靠着自己的聪明才智（无耻+颜值）硬生生在赘婿中杀出一条血路来，成为无数赘婿的终生奋斗目标。
一开始被所有人嘲笑的小小赘婿最后却成了大夏历史上浓墨重彩的一笔，后世评价：做人得像徐则安这样，却又不能太徐则安......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e480ba2378660857b0afd28360708188","author":"尘述者","author_id":"","book_id":"7372533765823810584","book_name":"让你做赘婿，你靠魅魔体质做皇帝","book_short_name":"无双公子谋","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7372540769342587416","read_count":"23433","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1086118"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"504","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,女帝,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f455f746c208da69d297e7161ccb5a30~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779272113&x-signature=elaMOjHBqOdp51OAR2DtWldTFYM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4318518017792621","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1040"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118151384775536978A1EB98270"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读50小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":79957,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":179158,"reply_count":1,"show_
